title: The Optimization Landscape of Machine Learning
description: A flowchart contrasting the smooth, deterministic path of pure optimization with the iterative, empirical, and approximate path of a learning algorithm, highlighting key differences.
relationships: Pure optimization minimizes a known, fixed function directly.
Machine learning uses training data as a proxy to approximate the minimization of the true risk.
The optimization algorithm adjusts model parameters to reduce training loss.
The goal is to have the reduced training loss correlate with a reduction in the true generalization error (risk), which is not guaranteed.
